creator: walter.von.entferndt@posteo.net
text:
Hi!

Output of periodic monthly:
Downloading GeoIP database files:
/usr/local/etc/periodic/monthly/geoipupdate: /usr/local/sbin/geoipupdate: not found

IMHO geoipupdate should be instaled in sbin/.  So either the install script or the periodic script is wrong.
